name: right-sheet
description: Gesture-driven side sheet that slides in from the right edge with drag-to-dismiss support.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the sheet is shown

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback invoked when the sheet is dismissed via rightward drag or backdrop press

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the right sheet

props.name: width
props.description: Sheet width as a fraction of the screen width (0–1)

props.name: showHandle
props.description: Whether to show a handle indicator on the sheet

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the sheet container

props.name: hideBackdrop
props.description: When true, the dimmed backdrop is hidden and touches pass through it

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false);
<RightSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} width={0.8}>
  <FilterPanel />
</RightSheet>

examples.label: Example 2
Example 3
examples.code:
// Without backdrop — content behind sheet remains interactive
<RightSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} hideBackdrop>
  <NotificationList />
</RightSheet>

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Narrow sheet (40% width) for a quick detail preview
<RightSheet visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} width={0.4}>
  <ProductPreview product={selected} />
</RightSheet>
